entry.title: Google's Gemini Spark Works 24/7 on Your Tasks While You Sleep
entry.summary: Gemini Spark is Google's always-on AI agent that runs in the cloud 24/7, taking multi-step actions across your Google Workspace even when your devices are off â now in beta for US AI Ultra subscribers.

entry.title: OpenCode Fixes the Metric That Made Chatty AI Models Look Dominant
entry.summary: OpenCode's public data dashboard now ranks models by unique users, fixing a bias where verbose models looked more popular than they actually were

entry.title: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 Beats Every Open-Weights Model to Match GPT-5.5
entry.summary: Artificial Analysis independently benchmarks Z.ai's GLM-5.2, finding it tops all open-weights models on real-world agentic work and matches GPT-5.5 at a fraction of the cost.

entry.title: GitHub Bakes Impeccable Into Copilot to Fix AI's Generic UI Problem
entry.summary: GitHub bakes Impeccable's AI design skill directly into the Copilot app, giving every developer polished UI output without any manual setup

entry.title: NVIDIA's ArtiFixer Beats Prior 3D Scene Reconstruction by 3 dB
entry.summary: NVIDIA's ArtiFixer uses autoregressive diffusion to fill geometry gaps in 3D Gaussian Splatting scenes, beating prior SOTA by 1â3 dB PSNR

entry.title: Google's Interactions API Goes Live as the Primary Way to Build Gemini Agents
entry.summary: Google's Interactions API hits GA, becoming the primary way to build with Gemini â adding managed agents, background execution, and a new step-based schema

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5-Cyber Launches to Patch the World's Open-Source Security Holes
entry.summary: OpenAI expands Daybreak with a full GPT-5.5-Cyber release, Codex Security workflows, 30+ industry partners, and a Patch the Planet open-source initiative

entry.title: Vercel's AI SDK 7 Rebuilds LLM Observability on Open-Source OpenTelemetry
entry.summary: AI SDK 7 replaces per-call observability wiring with a pluggable TelemetryIntegration system, giving any provider a clean hook into every model call and tool execution.

entry.title: Remotion Ships 50+ Video Effects React Developers can Control With AI
entry.summary: Remotion ships 50+ canvas pixel effects with keyframing, visual editing, and AI agent support baked in from day one

entry.title: Google DeepMind Bets $75M on A24 to Build AI Filmmaking Tools
entry.summary: Google DeepMind and A24 launch a research collaboration to build AI filmmaking tools with creators at the center, backed by a ~$75M Google investment in the studio

entry.title: ByteDance's Seed 2.1 Pro Matches Claude Opus 4.6 on Frontend Code Before Launch
entry.summary: ByteDance's Seed 2.1 Pro Preview debuts at #8 on Arena's frontend code leaderboard, matching Claude Opus 4.6 on React and UI tasks before public release.

entry.title: Sakana AI's Fugu Ultra Beats GPT-5 by Orchestrating Rival Models
entry.summary: Sakana AI's Fugu Ultra matches Fable 5 and Mythos Preview by orchestrating a swappable pool of frontier models through a single OpenAI-compatible API.
